title: YouTube Poop: The Sky Had A Weegee!
description:
Updated description [5/02/14] - This was my second YouTube Poop at the time it was uploaded, a time when meme replacements, including Weegee, were highly popular (yet also highly criticized for being overused). Currently, this video is, for whatever reason, the third-most viewed YouTube poop of all time behind CaptainOhYeah's "Pride Patties," and some other arbitrary Frozen YTP, and currently the 2nd most-viewed YouTube Poop still on YouTube. It is also, to the best of my knowledge, the first YouTube Poop to be cited and mentioned in a published textbook, "Copyright and Popular Media" by Trajce Cvetkovski, regarding the legality and fair use of internet parodies.

Original description: This is my second YouTube Poop. Spongebob is eating cereal when a giant Weegee falls from the sky! Spongebob yells at Squidward for help, because he doesn't know what to do. Before long, Spongebob, Patrick, and Squidward climb the spaghetti ladder to the Flying Bowser's ship, where Spongebob and Patrick get eaten for dinner.
